emails.subject: Re: 570892.1
emails.body: Re: 570892.1 This is a Real Time deal, and that desk enters deals a bit differently than I do. When they initially do a deal, they enter it for a certain hour or set of hours. Then, if they agree with a counterparty to extend the deal to flow through more hours, they change the deal in Scheduling, not EnPower. The way to see the true volume of a Short Term West Hourly deal is to look in the "View Actuals" tab. If you look at this deal, you'll see that they extended the initial 5 MW at HE 11 to look like this: HE 11 5 MW HE 12 5 MW HE 13 5 MW HE 14 4 MW HE 15 4 MW HE 16 4 MW HE 17 5 MW +__________ 32 MW Please let me know if you have any other questions. Thanks, Kate Symes Trading Support 503-464-7486 Judy Dyer@EES 04/16/2001 10:48 AM
570892.1 Can you please let me know if there are other deals that go with the deal referenced above? We have a total of 32 MW but this is only for 5. Thanks Judy
